A photorealistic close-up of a gold pendant necklace held by female hand. The pendant features a bas-relief engraving of [image /emoji]. The pendant hangs from a polished gold chain. The background is softly blurred with neutral beige tones, and natural lighting, realistic skin tones, Product photography, 16:9 aspect ratio.

## Notes
Replace `[image /emoji]` in the prompt with a specific image description or an emoji.

## Reference Image
(Optional) An image can be uploaded to be used as the bas-relief pattern.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/azed_ai/status/1915770501705925106)

## Example Output
![Gold Pendant Necklace](/media/3d/gold-pendant-necklace.webp)
description_en: Image-generation prompt for a photorealistic product shot of a gold pendant necklace whose bas-relief engraving is set from an image or emoji.
description_zh: 图像生成提示词，生成一条金色吊坠项链的写实产品照，吊坠浮雕图案由图片或 emoji 指定。
long_en: Close-up of a gold pendant on a polished chain held in hand, soft beige background, 16:9 product photography. The engraving can be driven by an emoji or an optional uploaded image.
long_zh: 手持金色吊坠特写，抛光链条、柔和米色背景、16:9 产品摄影。浮雕图案可用 emoji 或可选上传的图片来指定。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model; an optional uploaded reference image would be sent to a third-party service.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型；可选上传的参考图会被发送给第三方服务。
